import json, re
nb = json.load\(open\('credit_risk_monitoring.ipynb'\)\)
emoji_pattern = re.compile\('[\\U00010000-\\U0010ffff]|[\\U0001F600-\\U0001F64F]|[\\U0001F300-\\U0001F5FF]|[\\U0001F680-\\U0001F6FF]|[\\U0001F1E0-\\U0001F1FF]', flags=re.UNICODE\)
all_source = ' '.join\(''.join\(c['source']\) for c in nb['cells']\)
matches = emoji_pattern.findall\(all_source\)
print\(f'Notebook: {len\(matches\)} emoji/icons found', matches[:10] if matches else ''\)
")
